title: AI-Brains agy-hook payload
description: JSON payload passed to `ai-bbrains agy-hook --payload`. Encodes a single Antigravity session that the hook should ingest.

transcriptPath.description: Absolute path to the Antigravity transcript (.jsonl). Normalized via ai-brains-path on Windows.

sessionId.description: Antigravity session UUID. Used to drive delta-sync against the vault.

projectHash.description: Antigravity projectHash (typically a short hex string). Auto-linked to the project on first ingest.
